linkedin_profile.headline: Luxury Hospitality & Branding Leader | CMO @ Maybourne | Former IHG Luxury Strategy | Founder & Entrepreneur | NED
linkedin_profile.about: As Chief Marketing Officer at Maybourne, I am responsible for defining and executing the brand and commercial strategy that drives revenue outperformance and positions the brand at the pinnacle of luxury hospitality. Our selective portfolio spans storied and extraordinary hotels, branded residences, members’ clubs, wellness, retail, and dining concepts. Previously, I founded Lido Branding, delivering strategic assignments for ultra-luxury hotels, healthcare, private equity, family offices, and start-ups. In 2020, as part of a consortium, we secured an Innovate UK Award that enabled the development of AIUS, an innovative technology venture in security and intelligence. With a career grounded in international hospitality and luxury operations, past highlights include: • Leading global brand strategy for IHG’s luxury & lifestyle portfolio • Operating InterContinental London Park Lane (flagship) • Repositioning landmark properties in Hong Kong, Bangkok, Paris, London, and New York I bring a rare blend of C-suite leadership, international perspective, brand expertise, and entrepreneurial innovation. I help organisations grow, transform, and compete to win at the very top of the luxury market.

linkedin_profile.headline: Luxury Hospitality Commercial Leader | Sales, Groups & Events | P&L Ownership | Repositioning | Global Account Development | Driving ADR, RevPAR & Revenue Growth
linkedin_profile.about: Luxury hospitality commercial leader with over 18 years’ experience driving Sales, Groups, Events, Marketing and Revenue performance for some of the world’s most iconic brands, including Fairmont/Accor, Waldorf Astoria/ Hilton, Maybourne Hotel Group, Park Hyatt, GHM and Jumeirah. My expertise spans multi-property leadership, commercial strategy, repositioning, luxury consortia partnerships (AMEX FHR, Virtuoso, Signature), P&L ownership, forecasting and global market development across the UK, Europe, North America and Australia. I have a proven track record of elevating luxury brand positioning, securing top-tier consortia acceptance, driving year-on-year revenue growth, expanding high-yield international production and strengthening Groups and Events performance. Recognised for developing high-performing commercial teams, building strong relationships with owners and asset managers, and shaping market strategies that unlock long-term revenue potential. Luxury-focused. Commercially driven. Globally experienced. Areas of expertise: Commercial strategy | Multi-property leadership | Sales & events optimisation | P&L & forecasting | Luxury consortia | Market expansion | Repositioning | High-performing team leadership | Owner & asset management relations | Brand alignment | Cross-functional collaboration

experience.title: Director Of Sales
experience.description: Led Sales, Group Sales and Events/Reservations for the hotel, managing a team of 8. Secured the property’s acceptance into Virtuoso, Signature and AMEX FHR, elevating the hotel’s visibility within the global luxury travel market. Increased luxury consortia contribution by 200 percent and strengthened high-yield groups and events business, improving shoulder-month occupancy and overall segment mix. Collaborated closely with the Hilton sales force and leading local DMCs to grow international demand, elevate luxury leisure and group production, and expand high-value opportunities across key global feeder markets.

experience.title: Cluster Director Of Sales
experience.organization: Maybourne Hotel Group - Claridge's, The Connaught & The Berkley
experience.description: Led Sales, Groups & Events strategy across three flagship London luxury hotels. Drove all luxury consortia account management (AMEX FHR, Virtuoso, Signature, Traveller Made) across the UK, Europe and Australia for the full Maybourne cluster. Diversified the business mix by developing high-value relationships with private members’ clubs, Mayfair casinos and elite partner communities, strengthening luxury leisure and corporate production. Managed UNWTO and ultra-high-net-worth individual travel for top suites and premium inventory, maximising high-yield revenue. Worked closely with the DOSM to oversee cluster commercial planning, P&L alignment and long-range sales strategy for all three properties.

experience.title: Director Of Sales Marketing (London-Based)
experience.description: Lead all Sales, Groups, Events, Marketing, Revenue and Reservations functions (team of 6). Develop and execute commercial strategy across the UK, Europe, US, Canada and North America. Secured and achieved the property’s acceptance into AMEX FHR, Virtuoso, Signature and Traveller Made, strengthening global luxury production and elevating brand visibility. Increased group and events contribution, strengthening shoulder-night occupancy and improving MICE performance. Hold full responsibility for P&L management, forecasting, budgeting and long-range commercial planning. Led the full post-renovation repositioning following the 2017 upgrade, restoring competitive presence in key international feeder markets. Drove sustained year-on-year total revenue growth by reshaping market strategy, elevating luxury partnerships and unlocking high-yield international production. Diversified market mix with strong expansion from the US, EU and LATAM. Maintain strong ownership and asset management relations through weekly commercial reviews. Work closely with the Accor Luxury Regional Team and Accor GSO to enhance global account penetration and incremental revenue generation.

experience.title: Lifestyle Manager - Tickets Specialist
experience.description: Ten Lifestyle assists its members to discover, organise and book travel, dining and live entertainment. Specialising in global sporting and live entertainment events, I made personalised recommendations and ticket, VIP and hospitality bookings for high net-worth clients from around the world. My knowledge and expertise was vital in finding our members the most suitable packages whether it be entertaining clients, family or friends.

experience.title: Marketing Executive
experience.description: Supporting our concierge and loyalty programmes with bespoke communications programmes. These include personalised eCRM, marketing campaigns, engagement tools, and globally distributed content. I work closely with our client partners to create a communications package that works for them - driving engagement, penetration, and impact. Ten Group is is a leading, technology-enabled lifestyle and travel platform, providing trusted concierge services to its members around the clock, 365 days a year. The Group currently has a headcount of over 800 staff around the world and is listed on the AIM market of the London Stock Exchange.

experience.title: Senior Digital Marketing Executive
experience.description: Online marketing - developing and executing online marketing plans to deliver continuous growth of online traffic, online reservations and e-commerce sales.

experience.title: Email Marketing Manager
experience.description: As Email Marketing Manager I am responsible for all marketing communications for our three 5* hotels in London – Claridge’s, The Connaught and The Berkeley as well as The Maybourne Beverly Hills in LA and The Maybourne Riviera on the Côte d'Azur. Key Responsibilities: • Project management – gathering content, briefing agency partners and managing approvals. • Creating, designing and sending out B2C newsletters for all our hotels – promoting new products and providing hotel updates. • Email optimization – working with designers to improve KPI objectives including delivery rate, open rate, clicks and bounces with the aim of improving the UX to drive content engagement and conversions. • Reporting on email marketing performance and providing actionable insights to key stakeholders. • Email automation – managing our automation marketing tools to provide a seamless experience for our guests. • E-commerce marketing – managing all marketing communications for the online shops at all hotels across the group. Reporting all key performance metrics including conversions, CPA and ROAS. • B2B marketing – working with the Sales team to send out regular B2B newsletters, providing top clients with latest offers and news from across the business. As a member of the wider Digital and Brand Marketing teams other responsibilities included: • Website updates across the business, ensuring that webpages are always accurate and up-to-date. • Working closely with the Digital Project Manager and external agencies to implement on-site SEO recommendations, to improve rankings on SERP and increase relevant traffic to the websites. • Assisting the Digital Project Manager with all PPC and Display Ad campaigns.
